description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. The frame features a textured grip panel for enhanced handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and slightly thickened for durability. The slide is solid and blocky, with minimal external markings, and the barrel is short and cylindrical, extending slightly from the front of the slide. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile. The overall construction suggests a focus on functionality and reliability, with no ornate embellishments or decorative elements.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip, rounded trigger guard, and a short, cylindrical barrel. The design is robust and utilitarian, emphasizing function over decoration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the textured grip, trigger, and slide details.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the width of the slide and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the grip and slide features, with the ejection port and safety lever visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle opening, front sight, and the circular barrel profile.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the palm, featuring a dense, checkered texture for secure handling. The material appears to be a matte black polymer, providing both durability and a non-slip surface. There are no visible logos or finger grooves, and the design is straightforward, prioritizing function over aesthetics. The grip panels are integrated seamlessly into the frame, with a subtle border outlining the textured area.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, untextured finish and lacks any undercuts or squared-off edges. The design is conventional, with no integrated accessories or reinforcement, focusing on simplicity and structural integrity.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, extending slightly from the front of the slide. It has a standard, non-threaded profile with a matte black finish matching the rest of the handgun. There are no visible compensators, ports, or external markings on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, or visible logos or texturing on the magazine base.
